title: Staging→Main Promotion Hardening — clear CodeQL security debt blocking the promotion

tasks.title: Enumerate the complete CodeQL finding set for the staging→main diff
tasks.description: Open (or reuse) a staging→main promotion PR and read the FULL CodeQL annotation set from the check run, plus the repo's open code-scanning alerts, in one pass — not one-at-a-time. Classify each finding real vs false positive. Record the authoritative inventory in progress.md. Known so far: 2 ReDoS (already fixed on staging), 1 DOM-XSS in PreferenceToggles (likely FP).

tasks.title: Resolve PreferenceToggles DOM-XSS (same-origin guard or justified dismissal)
tasks.description: apps/web/src/components/account/PreferenceToggles.client.tsx:282 — window.location.assign of a path rebuilt from location segments + validated locale. Add a defensive same-origin guard on the constructed target (assert it starts with '/' and carries no scheme) — defence-in-depth that also clears CodeQL — or dismiss with a written justification if confirmed inert.

tasks.title: Fix any remaining real CodeQL findings from the inventory
tasks.description: For each finding classified real in T-001 (beyond the XSS and the already-fixed ReDoS), implement the fix on staging with a regression test where applicable, so it clears when promoted.

tasks.title: Dismiss/justify confirmed false positives
tasks.description: For findings classified false-positive in T-001, dismiss them via GitHub code-scanning with a written justification (or add the supported inline suppression). Record each rationale in progress.md so future promotions don't re-litigate them.

tasks.title: Re-validate a staging→main promotion is fully green (CI Pass + CodeQL)
tasks.description: Open a staging→main promotion PR and confirm CodeQL = success (0 new high/critical) and CI Pass = success. Confirms the already-fixed ReDoS alerts (#1/#2) clear once on main, and the XSS + any other findings are resolved.

tasks.title: Decide & wire a measure to prevent CodeQL debt re-accumulating on staging
tasks.description: CodeQL runs only against main today, so staging accrues invisible findings. Evaluate: (A) run CodeQL on staging PRs/push, (B) scheduled CodeQL on staging, (C) promote more often to keep the diff small. Decide, document the rationale, and implement if adopted.

tasks.title: Hand off the green promotion to the owner (unblocks SPEC-219 T-005)
tasks.description: On a green promotion PR, hand off to the owner to merge staging→main. Note this also lands the SPEC-219 Dependabot ignore on main, unblocking SPEC-219 T-005 (then @dependabot recreate #1588 to regenerate the group without zod / @tanstack/react-router).
